description: Promotional marketing email with sale dates

input_summary.subject: 🎉 Presidents Day Sale - Up to 50% Off!

events.title: BigStore Presidents Day Sale
events.description: Presidents Day Sale with up to 50% off everything. Sale runs February 14-17, 2026. Featuring furniture (50% off select sofas), bedding (buy 2 get 1 free), kitchen (40% off cookware sets), and electronics (up to $200 off TVs). Use code PRES20 for extra 20% off online orders. Free shipping on orders over $49. Regular store hours: Mon-Sat 10AM-9PM, Sun 11AM-6PM. Some exclusions apply.
